ChangeHistory.p: Version 9.0
Addition of Out of Hours Domain
Addition of Admission Domain
Addition of Diagnositic Imaging Report
Addition of Health and Social Care Integration
Addition of NHS Direct
Version 8.0
Removal of clinically relevant time template from all domains
Reformat of constraints for CCN 404 (document format change)
Version 7.0
Changes required for sealing removal detailed in the appropriate constraint change history sections
To address sealing changes, removed COCD_TP146043 UK03 and COCD_TP146045 UK03 from Template "NPFIT-000011 #Role"
Constraints NPFIT-000018# Role,"NPFIT-000010# Role","NPFIT-000010#Section" have been removed in line with sealing changes
Added new NPFIT-000030#Section and NPFIT-000031#Section constraints for new seal report documents
All POCD parent models have been upversioned due to sealing changes
Added new constraints for non CDA sealing event notification message which is now templated
Version 6.0
Added new DomainList to enable recording of domain usage
Changed usage tags to domain tags
Version 5.0
Added new DomainList to enable recording of domain usage
Transform used to add usage to all constraints
Version 4.0
Added new NPFIT-000024#Role for authenticator
Split dataEnterer templates from authenicator
Removed Risk to patient ref from risk to patient template as cannot be referenced from self
Removed COCD_TP145010 UK02 device template from NPFIT-000021#Role constraint
Upversioned all template versions due to changes in datatypes
Constraints now have individual version numbers. These versions are carried in the constraint schemas in the TemplateSchema folder and the template cross reference manual
Version 3.0
Removed discontinuation template from everywhere except plan medication administration
Updated all version numbers due to change in template mechanism
Removed NPFIT-000015#Role as not used
New NPFIT-000025#Role for receiver of medication supply
Removed discontinuation ref from all constraints except plan and request for medication administration
Version 6.0 New assessement ref template added
Version 5.0 new HSCI templates added
Version 4.0 COCD_TP147029UK03, COCD_TP147030UK03 and COCD_TP147031UK03 upversioned to version 04 due to changes to reference templates for CDA complaincy ( adding of consumable)

b.font: Constraint :- For a reference to be used within a domain, the template referred to must be utilised within that domain

ChangeHistory.p: Version 4.0 COCD_TP147029UK03, COCD_TP147030UK03 and COCD_TP147031UK03 upversioned to version 04 due to changes to reference templates for CDA complaincy ( adding of consumable) removed not required references
Refined references allowed after clinical review

b.font: Constraint :- For a reference to be used within a domain, the template referred to must be utilised within that domain
Constraint :- For a reference to be used within a domain, the template referred to must be utilised within that domain

ChangeHistory.p: Added HSCI parent models
DIG added as a parent model
Version 2.0
Upversioned COCD_TP146075UK01 to 02 due to adding of missing contextControlCode in tracker and performer Version Upversioned
COCD_TP146021UK04 to 05 due to change to add finding reference
COCD_TP146073UK01 and COCD_TP146073UK01 upversioned to 02 due to changes to code and value

Change due to upversion of COCD_TP146095UK01 to 02 for constraint on focal act fix

Upversioned COCD_TP146021UK04 to 05 due to change to add finding reference

Changed parent model to POCD_MT150001 UK06 for new format changes CCN404

Removed COCD_TP146043 UK03 and COCD_TP146045 UK03 for sealing changes

Version 3.0 added new HSC templates. Added COCD_TP146077UK01 to list of domains using this template.
Version 4.0 up-versioned COCD_TP145022UK01-EntitySDSwithReqRoleProfile template after additional of organisation
Version 3.0 Added HSCI and MHS templates
Version 4.0 up-versioned COCD_TP145022UK01-EntitySDSwithReqRoleProfile template after additional of organisation

Removed COCD_TP146021 UK02,COCD_TP146029 UK02,COCD_TP146030 UK02
Removed COCD_TP146036 UK02,COCD_TP145010 UK02

Version 4.0 added detailed service delivery location templates to parent model
Version 3.0 added HSC and MHS templates to parent model
Version 3.0 added ADM, HSC and DIG
Version 5.0 up-version due to upversion of COCD_TP145021UK03 to 04 due to change of code from CNE to CWE

Version 3.0
Removed EntitySDS and replaced with new RecipientEntitySDS as RoleCode not allowed at this point in CDA
added ADM, HSC and DIG parent models
Upversioned to 2.0 for new CDA format
Version 3.0 added ADM, HSC and DIG
Version 3.0
Removed all templates except COCD_TP145004 UK02 as this can only be an SDS person
added ADM, HSC and DIG
